nodes.name: bmad-kb
nodes.summary: BMAD knowledge base containing comprehensive reference information about the framework, methodologies, best practices, and usage guidelines

nodes.name: brainstorming-techniques
nodes.summary: Reference guide for brainstorming techniques used during requirements elicitation and design exploration sessions

nodes.name: elicitation-methods
nodes.summary: Reference documentation for requirements elicitation methods including interviews, workshops, and observation techniques

nodes.name: technical-preferences
nodes.summary: Project-specific technical preferences and standards used to guide BMAD agent recommendations and decisions

nodes.name: test-levels-framework
nodes.summary: Framework defining the different levels of testing (unit, integration, e2e) and when each should be applied in the BMAD workflow

nodes.name: test-priorities-matrix
nodes.summary: Matrix for prioritizing test scenarios based on risk, business impact, and technical complexity
